---
title: &TITLE Rigoberto Padilla Bustos
last: Padilla
first: Rigoberto
people_group: gradstudent
email: "padillab.rigo@gmail.com"
education:
  - Ph.D. student Biomedical Sciences program | UNAM
subtitle: PhD student
description: ""
bio: "Rigoberto Padilla Bustos obtained a bachelor’s degree in Biology from the University of Guadalajara (UdG) in 2023 and is currently a PhD student at the International Laboratory for Human Genome Research (LIIGH-UNAM), under the supervision of Dr. Federico Sánchez Quinto. His work focuses on the paleogenomics of megafauna remains, particularly he works with autosomic data from columbian mammoths (Mammuthus columbi), reconstructing their evolutionary history, genetic diversity and structure. He also works on the limitations and capabilities of molecular sex determination based on whole-genome sequencing in ancient remains."
image: avatar.jpg

# Group publications
listing:
  - id: group-pubs
    template: ../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs 
    contents: 
      - "../../publications/**/*.qmd"
      - "!../../publications/_template/"
    sort: "pub_number desc"
    filter-ui: true
    include:
      author: *TITLE
    fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]

  - id: personal-pubs
    template: ../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs 
    contents: 
      - "../../personal_publications/**/*.qmd"
      - "!../../personal_publications/_template/"
    sort: "pub_number desc"
    filter-ui: true
    include:
      author: *TITLE
    fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]

page-layout: full # La página se muestra en ancho completo.
about: 
  id: about
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round # imagen redonda
  image: avatar.jpg
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:padillab.rigo@gmail.com
---

<hr>

:::: {#about}
## Education

{{< meta education >}}

## Description

::: {style="text-align: justify;"}
{{< meta bio >}}
:::

<br>
::::

## {{< meta first >}}'s Group Publications

::: {#group-pubs}
:::

## {{< meta first >}}'s Personal Publications

::: {#personal-pubs}
:::
